title: Xenial Roasted Polish Pork Kebabs
description: A festive Polish dish featuring star anise and score fat, made with macrobiotic friendly ingredients, this recipe is perfect for special occasions. The combination of pork, vegetables, and spices creates a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the melted score fat, ground star anise, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the score fat mixture.
Thread the pork cubes, onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms onto skewers.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
After 25 minutes, brush the skewers with the pan juices and continue to roast for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
